related_modules.description: 服务层目录，已有__init__.py和任务6创建的embedding_service.py，本任务新增vector_store_service.py
Pydantic Settings配置类，已含CHROMA_PATH="./data/vector_db"，无需新增配置
启动/关闭事件，任务6已添加EmbeddingService加载，本任务再添加VectorStoreService初始化
FastAPI入口，/health已含hardcoded chroma状态，需改为真实状态

existing_implementations.description: §10.1中已有VectorStoreService完整类设计代码(含initialize/add_papers/search/delete_papers/count/close)，以及§10.2的ChromaDB Schema

relevant_modules.name: VectorStoreService
relevant_modules.responsibility: Chroma向量数据库服务 — 初始化连接、管理papers collection、向量存储/检索/删除、元数据过滤

key_interfaces.name: __init__
key_interfaces.description: 构造函数，接收Settings配置对象，初始化client=None, collection=None, status='disconnected'

key_interfaces.name: initialize
key_interfaces.description: 初始化ChromaDB：1)创建chromadb.PersistentClient(path=CHROMA_PATH)；2)get_or_create_collection('papers', metadata={hnsw:space:'cosine', hnsw:M:16, hnsw:construction_ef:200})；3)记录papers collection当前数量；4)设置status='connected'

key_interfaces.name: add_papers
key_interfaces.signature: async def add_papers(self, paper_ids: list, embeddings: list, metadatas: list, documents: list) -> None
key_interfaces.description: 添加论文向量：批量写入paper_ids(如['arxiv_2024_001'])、embeddings(每条768维list)、metadatas(含paper_id/title/year/venue等)、documents(标题+摘要文本)。调用self.collection.add()，记录添加数量

key_interfaces.name: search
key_interfaces.signature: async def search(self, embedding: list, top_k: int = 10, filters: dict = None) -> list
key_interfaces.description: 向量相似度检索：1)构建where过滤条件(解析yearFrom/yearTo/venue)；2)调用collection.query(query_embeddings=[embedding], n_results=top_k, where=where_filter, include=['metadatas','distances','documents'])；3)格式化结果为[{paperId,title,abstract,score(1-distance),year,venue}]列表

key_interfaces.name: delete_papers
key_interfaces.signature: async def delete_papers(self, paper_ids: list) -> None

key_interfaces.name: count
key_interfaces.description: 获取当前collection中的向量数量：return self.collection.count()

files_to_modify.description: 实现VectorStoreService向量数据库服务：PersistentClient连接、papers collection管理、add_papers批量写入、search语义检索(含元数据过滤)、delete_papers、count、close
启动时创建全局vector_store_service实例并调用initialize()；关闭时调用close()释放连接
/health接口中chroma字段从硬编码'not_connected'改为动态获取vector_store_service.status

functional_requirements.description: VectorStoreService.initialize()异步方法：1)创建chromadb.PersistentClient(path=self.settings.CHROMA_PATH)，如果目录不存在自动创建；2)调用client.get_or_create_collection(name='papers', metadata={'hnsw:space':'cosine', 'hnsw:M':16, 'hnsw:construction_ef':200})；3)记录当前collection中已有向量数量logger.info(f'ChromaDB initialized, papers count={count}')；4)设置self.status='connected'。如连接失败catch异常，设置status='error'，raise VectorStoreException

VectorStoreService.add_papers()异步方法：参数paper_ids:List[str](论文唯一ID)、embeddings:List[List[float]](每条768维向量)、metadatas:List[dict](含paper_id/title/year/venue/citation_count/chunk_index/chunk_type)、documents:List[str](标题+摘要文本)。调用self.collection.add(ids=paper_ids, embeddings=embeddings, metadatas=metadatas, documents=documents)。参数长度必须一致，不一致时raise ValueError。成功后logger.info(f'Added {len(paper_ids)} papers to ChromaDB')

VectorStoreService.search()异步方法：参数embedding:List[float](查询向量768维)、top_k:int=10(返回数量)、filters:Optional[dict]=None(元数据过滤条件，含yearFrom/yearTo/venue可选字段)。构建where_filter：filters中yearFrom→{$gte:yearFrom}、yearTo→{$lte:yearTo}、venue→{$eq:venue}，多条件用{$and:[...]}组合。调用collection.query(query_embeddings=[embedding], n_results=top_k, where=where_filter, include=['metadatas','distances','documents'])。格式化结果：score=1-distance(cosine距离转相似度，范围0-1)。返回format为[{paperId,title,abstract,score,year,venue},...]列表
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: search(向量,top_k=5)返回5条结果，每条含paperId/title/abstract/score/year/venue字段

functional_requirements.description: VectorStoreService.delete_papers()异步方法：参数paper_ids:List[str]。调用self.collection.delete(ids=paper_ids)。成功后记录日志，不抛异常(即使部分ID不存在也正常执行chromadb的幂等删除)
VectorStoreService.count()异步方法：返回self.collection.count()获取collection中向量总数。如果collection为None则返回0
VectorStoreService.close()异步方法：设置self.client=None, self.collection=None, self.status='disconnected'。不抛异常，可在服务关闭时安全调用

events.py添加VectorStoreService初始化和关闭：在on_startup()中(EmbeddingService加载之后)创建vector_store_service实例并调用await vector_store_service.initialize()；在on_shutdown()中(日志记录之前)调用await vector_store_service.close()。vector_store_service需要声明为模块级变量供main.py引用
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 启动日志显示 'ChromaDB initialized, papers count=X'

functional_requirements.description: main.py /health接口更新：将'chroma':'not_connected'改为动态获取vector_store_service.status。导入方式与embedding_service类似

python.rule: Router → Service → Agent，逻辑不在路由函数中。VectorStoreService属于Service层

prohibited: 在循环中打印INFO及以上级别日志
在日志中输出敏感信息（密码、Token、API Key）

security.auth_mechanism: JWT Token (24h有效期) + Redis黑名单

forbidden_actions.reason: 必须输出完整可执行代码

forbidden_actions.action: 修改需求范围外的模块

forbidden_actions.reason: 必须使用PersistentClient确保数据持久化到磁盘CHROMA_PATH

forbidden_actions.action: HNSW参数使用默认值(M=16必须, ef=200必须, space=cosine必须)
forbidden_actions.reason: 索引参数影响检索精度和性能，必须与文档规范一致
ChromaDB返回的是cosine距离(0-2)，需转换为相似度(1-distance)，使score范围0-1且越大越相似

forbidden_actions.action: add_papers()不校验参数长度一致性

forbidden_actions.reason: 健康检查依赖status字段返回正确状态

unit_tests.description: 添加3条论文向量，验证count()返回3；参数长度不一致验证抛出ValueError
添加3篇论文后，用与第2篇高度相似查询向量检索top_k=2，验证第2篇score最高(>0.8)，结果格式完整
添加多年份/多venue论文后，用filters={'yearFrom':2022,'yearTo':2023}检索，验证结果均满足过滤条件
添加3篇论文，删除1篇，验证count()=2，search不再返回被删除论文
空papers collection下search()返回空列表[]，count()返回0

verification_commands.command: cd Veritas/ai-service && python -c "from app.services.vector_store_service import VectorStoreService; from app.core.config import settings; import asyncio; async def t(): svc=VectorStoreService(settings); await svc.initialize(); print(svc.status, await svc.count()); await svc.close(); asyncio.run(t())"
cd Veritas/ai-service && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 & sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:8000/health
cd Veritas/ai-service && ls -la data/vector_db/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'vector_db dir will be auto-created'
verification_commands.expected_result: data/vector_db目录存在或将被自动创建

acceptance_criteria.criterion: add_papers可正确批量写入论文向量和元数据，参数长度校验
delete_papers删除后count相应减少，search不再返回
count()返回collection中向量总数，空collection返回0
